channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Koeman Likely to Inherit Large Sum from Netherlands Family
item.description: Dutch football manager Ronald Koeman is reportedly set to receive a significant inheritance, according to emerging reports. The 61-year-old coach, currently leading the Netherlands national team, has ...

item.title: Digital Forensics in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial: Importance of OSINT and Hash Values
item.description: The article discusses the use of digital forensics in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, focusing on how evidence is preserved through techniques like Open-Source Intelligence (OSINT) an...

item.title: India and Indonesia Strengthen Defense and Maritime Ties with Missile Deals
item.description: India and Indonesia have finalized agreements to supply BrahMos and Astra missiles, enhancing bilateral defense cooperation. The deal, signed during Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Jakarta, ex...

item.title: Liza Achieng's Journey from HIV Diagnosis to Advocacy
item.description: Liza Achieng, 25, revealed her HIV diagnosis after six months of recurring illness, which she initially thought was malaria or stress. The diagnosis came after persistent headaches and sickness led he...

item.title: ADC Candidate Warns Against Electing Incompetent Governors
item.description: ADC governorship candidate Biodun Collins Ogundipe has slammed Nigerians for electing unqualified politicians as governors, blaming poor leadership for the country's developmental issues. He warned vo...

item.title: Parliament's Oversight Visit to Musina Repatriation Centre Following 37,000 Migrant Processings
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Home Affairs conducted an urgent oversight visit to the Musina Repatriation Centre in Limpopo following reports that approximately 37,000 migrants had been processed through...

item.title: U.S.-Turkey relations and NATO defense strategies under scrutiny
item.description: The article discusses U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement to lift sanctions on Turkey and reassess the sale of F-35 stealth jets, following his meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan at ...

item.title: Former Florida Governor Candidate Faces Drug Charges After Arrest
item.description: Andrew Gillum, the former Democratic gubernatorial candidate who narrowly lost to Ron DeSantis in 2018, has been arrested in Alabama on drug possession charges. According to TMZ and police records, Gi...

item.title: Alabama Shakes Announce New Album 'I Must Be Dreaming' and Share Single 'I Feel Hope Coming'
item.description: Alabama Shakes have announced the release of their third studio album, titled 'I Must Be Dreaming', set for an August 28 drop via Island Records. The band, comprising Brittany Howard, Heath Fogg, and ...

item.title: Kate Winslet to star in second season of Netflix's ‘Adolescence’
item.description: A new series of the critically acclaimed Netflix show 'Adolescence' is in development, with Oscar-winning actress Kate Winslet confirmed as a lead. The original series, which premiered last year, expl...

item.title: Mudslide near tunnel project in Kerala's Wayanad kills two, leaves seven missing amid monsoon rains
item.description: A mudslide triggered by heavy monsoon rains near a twin tunnel project site in Kerala's Wayanad district killed at least two people and left seven missing. Debris from the landslide buried shelters ho...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of VP Sara Duterte Involves Controversial Video Statement
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte in the Philippines centers on a controversial video press conference she gave on November 23, 2024. During the virtual event, Duterte made statemen...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange declines 1,199 points amid profit-taking after record rally
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a significant decline of 1,199 points on Tuesday, ending a five-day bullish streak. The KSE-100 index fell below the 187,000-point mark as investors engag...

item.title: Kenya Met Forecasts Rain and Cold Conditions in Multiple Counties for Next Week
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a forecast predicting rain and cold conditions across several counties from July 7 to July 13. Counties like Bungoma, Homa Bay, Nyeri, and Nairobi ...

item.title: Graham Platner's Senate Campaign Faces Crisis After Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Graham Platner, a Democratic Senate candidate in Maine, faces mounting pressure to withdraw from his race against Senator Susan Collins after a bombshell rape allegation emerged. The accusation, repor...

item.title: Iyabo Ojo allows ex-husband to walk daughter down the aisle to break family conflict cycle
item.description: Iyabo Ojo, a Nollywood actress, revealed her decision to let her ex-husband, Ademidun Ojo, walk their daughter Priscilla down the aisle during her wedding to Tanzanian singer Juma Jux. She emphasized ...

item.title: Handling a Reunion with a Former Cruel Friend: A Guide to Maintaining Dignity
item.description: A 30-year-old woman faces anxiety about attending a destination milestone birthday party for a mutual friend, where she will encounter a former friend who once cruelly insulted her and another friend ...

item.title: South African Open Chess Championships Highlight Youth Development and Tournament Success
item.description: The 2026 South African Open Chess Championships, held from 27 June to 5 July at DF Akademie High School in Bellville, concluded as one of the largest and most successful tournaments in the event's his...

item.title: AFC funds $753m to revive Lobito Corridor railway linking Angola to DRC
item.description: The Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) has secured $753 million in financing to rehabilitate and operate the 1,300-kilometre Lobito Corridor railway, a critical trade route connecting Angola to the Demo...
